targetUsers: GTM sales operators managing account lists, enrichment, and PitchBook-style matching
Finance and banking analysts reconciling workbooks, exports, timecards, and variance evidence
Harness engineers converting messy workflow evidence into repeatable eval gates

notes: The profile stores only workbook shapes, categories, and header-level signals; raw private rows are not a repo artifact.
Most files are company research, classification, PitchBook, ParselyFi, or healthtech/JPM workflows.
Finance and ops files include timecards, timesheets, expense sheets, cost exports, and transaction exports with formula and layout concerns.

topCases.persona: Healthcare investor classifying a large conference or PitchBook export
Sales operations analyst preparing a PitchBook upload and match review
GTM analyst scoring target accounts against a reusable AMO rubric
Ops or finance reviewer approving contractor time
Investor building a JPM health market map from multiple workbook tabs
Account executive or analyst building a company brief for outreach
QA engineer mapping product actions to expected runtime behavior

steps.label: Gemini UI media review
steps.stdoutTail:
wrote D:\VSCode Projects\cafecorner_nodebench\nodebench_ai4\noderoom\docs\eval\agent-improvement-loop\gemini-ui-review.json
pass: The NodeRoom UI shows a fully functional collaborative environment. It features live spreadsheet manipulation, a multi-user chat, automated agent suggestions via an 'Auto-pilot' toggle, and a post-it note wall ('DBsync wall'). The system displays a live Room Trace capturing document changes, file uploads, and spreadsheet updates. Collaborative cues (online indicators for Pinya and nyaman) are active.

topRecommendations: Persist each new live trace into a durable eval fixture before promoting README charts.
Add browser-visible multi-user checks for public/private chat, artifact references, proposals, and trace accept-all.
generatedEvalIdeas: GTM PitchBook match: upload source and result files, drag both into chat, assert CellPayload evidence and no CRM clobber.
JPM health market map: cross-tab join into watchlist, assert source artifact row/column evidence.
Finance variance reconciliation: multi-user conflict plus reconcile_cell skip/correct/conflict assertions.
Timecard approval: detect gaps/duplicates and write a note without leaking private line items.
Provider parser media: PDF/PPTX/screenshot extraction into evidence-bearing dataframe cells.
UI trace lifecycle: browser click path for auto-accept modal, accept-all, proposal trace, and artifact updates.
nextLiveRuns: npm run benchmark:charts after docs/eval/results.json has benchmarkVersion=company-research-v2-9checks-router
